AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.banter.alive: The oracle's grace watches over me.
AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.cardsModifie: The Prophet's cards now appear in rewards and shops.
AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.description:
A young girl chosen by the divine oracle.
Her [gold]Piety[/gold] determines the oracle's favor,
and the power of [gold]Oracle[/gold] depends on how much faith she offers.
AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.eventDeathPr: Oracle... please grant me one more chance...
AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.goldMonologu: [sine]These coins... perhaps an offering to the oracle...[/sine]
AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.title: The Prophet
AICARDMOD-PROPHET_CHARACTER.unlockText: Play a run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
